excerpt.es: A dictionary mapping parameter names to parameter values.
excerpt.en: A dictionary mapping parameter names to parameter values.

description.en: MIME headers all start with the prefix ‘Content-’. Each specific header has a certain value, described under the class for that header. Some can also take a list of supplemental parameters, which have a common format. This class serves as a base for all the MIME headers that take parameters. params¶ A dictionary mapping parameter names to parameter values.
